pages.text: Time Period: Late Devonian Period $(br2)Temperament: Passive $(br2)Diet: Omnivorous $(br2)Preferred Habitats: Warm Oceans, Open Oceans
The Tartuosteus loves to leap high into the air and will do so often. A tartuosteus may rarely hatch from Jawless Fish Roe. When hatched at night, they will take on an evil, red appearance.
